name: cbta44_sys
author: CBTA 44 Sistema
description: Sistema base para Control Escolar e Ingresos Propios con ROC oficial.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite" "tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --watch" "tsx watch backend/sync-server.ts" "wait-on tcp:5173 tcp:8787 dist-electron/electron/main.js dist-electron/electron/preload.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 dist-electron/electron/main.js dist-electron/electron/preload.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron .
scripts.build:desktop: prisma generate && pnpm prisma:sync-client && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json
scripts.predist:win: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "taskkill /F /IM 'CBTA44_SYS.exe' 2>$null | Out-Null; taskkill /F /IM electron.exe 2>$null | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'release/win-unpacked' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; exit 0"
scripts.dist:win: prisma generate && pnpm prisma:sync-client && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.predist:win:portable: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "taskkill /F /IM 'CBTA44_SYS.exe' 2>$null | Out-Null; taskkill /F /IM electron.exe 2>$null | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'release/win-unpacked' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; exit 0"
scripts.dist:win:portable: prisma generate && pnpm prisma:sync-client && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && electron-builder --win portable
scripts.dist:mac: prisma generate && pnpm prisma:sync-client && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && electron-builder --mac dmg
scripts.dist:mac:zip: prisma generate && pnpm prisma:sync-client && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && electron-builder --mac zip
